summary: First-finish smoke test of Trading Journal MVP. Backend and frontend both verified end-to-end using the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All critical flows work: JWT auth (login/register/logout/me), trades CRUD with correct P&L calc (Long: (exit-entry)*qty-fees), analytics summary+calendar, journal upsert, Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI insights, user isolation, and full UI navigation for demo@tape.io.
passed: POST /api/auth/register new user -> 200 + token (user isolation verified: empty trades/journal)
POST /api/trades AAPL Long qty=10 entry=220 exit=225 fees=1 -> pnl=49 (correct)
GET /api/analytics/summary -> total_pnl, win_rate, avg_win, best/worst_trade, profit_factor, by_market, by_strategy, equity_curve all populated
POST /api/journal twice for same date -> upsert (single row, updated content)
POST /api/ai/insights (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations) returns markdown with '##' section headers; GET /api/ai/insights returns latest saved
Frontend: Login page (auth-form), login flow, current-user-email='demo@tape.io'
Frontend Dashboard: stats tiles, equity curve, PnL by market bar chart, recent trades, strategy leaderboard all render
Frontend Trades: add-trade dialog with live P&L preview (+49) works; new row created; search-trades filter narrows to 1 row for TSLA; delete-{id} + confirm-delete removes row
Frontend Calendar: nav-calendar loads with cal-prev/cal-next
Frontend Journal: journal-content save appears in journal-hist-{date} list
Frontend AI Insights: generate-insights loads existing insight rendered with amber section headers (Executive Summary, Strengths, Weaknesses & Leaks)
notes: Bearer JWT remains valid after logout (only httpOnly cookie is cleared) - expected JWT behavior; cookie-based auth is properly invalidated on logout.
Minor console warning from recharts: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' during initial render - non-blocking, charts render correctly.
Two 401 console errors on unauthenticated /api/auth/me probe before login - expected.
